case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A. VS. YEFIM G REMARENKO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO 395(B) VENUE OF PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REMARENKO, YEFIM G $5,801.59 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,026.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
